name: Tryndamere

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Battle Fury
passive.description_source: Innate:  Tryndamere generates  Fury on his  basic attacks,  critical strikes, and enemy kills. His Fury begins to decay after a period without dealing or taking damage.

effects.description: Innate: Tryndamere generates 5 Fury on his basic attacks on-hit, and 10 Fury on critical strikes and each time he kills an enemy. After 8 seconds without dealing or taking damage, Tryndamere loses 5 Fury per second.
Tryndamere gains 0% : 50% (based on Fury) critical strike chance.

passive.description: Innate: Tryndamere generates 5 Fury on his basic attacks on-hit, and 10 Fury on critical strikes and each time he kills an enemy. After 8 seconds without dealing or taking damage, Tryndamere loses 5 Fury per second.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Fury generation stacks additively: if the given action triggers multiple ways of generating Fury, all of them apply.

basic_ability_1.name: Bloodlust
basic_ability_1.description_source: Passive:  Tryndamere gains  bonus attack damage based on his missing health.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Tryndamere gains bonus attack damage based on his missing health, up to a maximum amount at 90% missing health.

effects.description: Bonus Attack Damage per 1% missing health
effects.context_notes: Passive: Tryndamere gains bonus attack damage based on his missing health, up to a maximum amount at 90% missing health.
Active: Tryndamere consumes all of his Fury to heal himself, increased for every point of Fury consumed.
Active: Tryndamere consumes all of his Fury to heal himself, increased for every point of Fury consumed.
Active: Tryndamere consumes all of his Fury to heal himself, increased for every point of Fury consumed.

basic_ability_1.description: Passive: Tryndamere gains bonus attack damage based on his missing health, up to a maximum amount at 90% missing health.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Bloodlust can still be activated even if Tryndamere does not have any Fury.

basic_ability_2.name: Mocking Shout
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Tryndamere reduces the  attack damage of nearby champions for a few seconds. Targets facing away from him are also  slowed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Tryndamere reduces the bonus attack damage of nearby enemy champions for 4 seconds.
Tryndamere also applies a curse to all nearby enemy champions for 3.

effects.description: A nearby enemy champion is required to cast this ability. The target does not have to be visible to be targeted by this ability.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Tryndamere reduces the bonus attack damage of nearby enemy champions for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Mocking Shout very briefly reveals Tryndamere if he uses it while in the fog of war to enemies.

basic_ability_3.name: Spinning Slash
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Tryndamere  dashes to the target location, dealing physical damage and generating  Fury per enemy hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Tryndamere dashes to the target location, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and generating 2 Fury per enemy hit, increased to 5 Fury against champions.

effects.description: Critical strikes on-hit reduce Spinning Slash's current cooldown by 0.75 seconds, doubled to 1.5 seconds against champions.
Bloodlust and Undying Rage can be cast during the dash.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Tryndamere dashes to the target location, dealing physical damage to enemies hit and generating 2 Fury per enemy hit, increased to 5 Fury against champions.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spinning Slash's Fury generation stacks additively with Battle Fury's Fury generation on kill.

ultimate.name: Undying Rage
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Tryndamere becomes enraged, gaining  Fury and a  minimum health threshold for a few seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Tryndamere becomes enraged, instantly gaining Fury and a minimum health threshold for 5 seconds.
Active: Tryndamere becomes enraged, instantly gaining Fury and a minimum health threshold for 5 seconds.

effects.description: Undying Rage can be used while affected by cast-inhibiting crowd control.

ultimate.description: Active: Tryndamere becomes enraged, instantly gaining Fury and a minimum health threshold for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Undying Rage will prevent Mel's Overwhelm's stacks from being consumed.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
